summary: Q1 2026 already reported April 15, 2026: EPS $1.11 (beat est $1.01 by 9.9%), NII $15.745B, raised full-year NII growth guidance to 6%-8%. Q2 2026 earnings expected July 14, 2026; revenue estimate ~$29.87B.
